title: BANDIT-055 Landing Verdict
landing_agent_replacement_evidence: - Codex PM local-record Stage 5 landing verdict replaces unavailable standalone Landing Agent for this bootstrap chore; local-record landing action remains the next required step after land-check passes.
rationale: BANDIT-055 is safe to land as the bounded bootstrap-gap chore resolving BANDIT-GAP-TOKEN-COST-FAILSAFE. Stage 4 aggregate review evidence records current review_subject_hash 455e51ea6c6cb07e2286e2614092fc69c9bb6f85e1facb128c23fb46b3983066, scoped pre-PR CodeRabbit provider-refusal/bootstrap_gap replacement evidence after repeated valid timeout attempts, Local Qwen non_blocking evidence with Codex PM disposition and durable Stage 6 retrospective routing for the locally_resolved_pending_refresh tracking concern, escalated review not_applicable, clean-code pass, source-drift current, no required operator input, and UAT not_applicable because this non-product chore changes local repo-native Token-Cost Failsafe policy validation and work-item brief/spec enforcement without shipping a browser-clickable operator surface. Current Stage 5 verification includes node --test test/token-cost-failsafe.test.mjs with 18 passing tests, node --test test/work-item-create.test.mjs with 8 passing tests, node --test test/coderabbit-state.test.mjs with 24 passing tests, npm test with 449 passing tests, npm run typecheck, npm run bandit -- token-cost-failsafe validate --json, npm run bandit -- coderabbit-review BANDIT-055, npm run bandit -- validate, npm run bandit -- gaps list showing BANDIT-GAP-TOKEN-COST-FAILSAFE active for BANDIT-055 and BANDIT-GAP-EVIDENCE-FRESHNESS-SLOS queued behind it, npm run bandit -- stage-capability-scope validate --json, npm run bandit -- risk-classification validate --json, npm run bandit -- supply-chain-gate validate --json, npm run bandit -- input-quarantine validate --json, npm run bandit -- operator-boundary validate --json, node ./bin/bandit.mjs cockpit status --json showing Stage 5 landing as the missing gate before this verdict, node ./bin/bandit.mjs session-context current --json reporting BANDIT-055 with no required operator input, node ./bin/bandit.mjs review-subject-hash BANDIT-055 with current review subject hash 455e51ea6c6cb07e2286e2614092fc69c9bb6f85e1facb128c23fb46b3983066, and pre-verdict npm run bandit -- land-check BANDIT-055 correctly failing closed on the missing landing verdict artifact. Clean-code status is pass after Codex PM reread CLEAN_CODE.md, confirmed Stage 1 brief read evidence, and evaluated the implementation against the rubric: the work stays aligned to the approved Token-Cost Failsafe spec, keeps token-cost policy repo-native and CLI-owned, preserves authority-role separation, preserves the Bootstrap Model-Family Separation and Permanent Test Ownership Boundary, preserves CLI authority, canonical repo artifacts, input quarantine, layered risk, supply-chain, claim authority, Git Mutation Serializer, Worktree Bootstrap Contract, Event-Driven Wake Scheduler, Agent Observability Trace, and repo-native source-of-truth boundaries, keeps the surface focused, has focused and full-suite tests, and leaves no accepted blocker-level clean-code concern. Product UAT is not applicable because this chore has no operator-clickable product surface. The accepted Local Qwen finding is non-blocking because the CodeRabbit timeout state remains fail-closed unless explicit provider-refusal/bootstrap_gap replacement evidence exists, and the retrospective must record the locally_resolved_pending_refresh state expansion as an intentional no-action workflow decision tied to the timeout disposition. The work introduces no Evidence SLO policy, full scheduler execution, full worktree lifecycle work, claim lease creation or release, work-surface reservation implementation, automatic merge/push/deploy behavior, product UAT approval, cockpit UI/server/API work, PR/CI workflow, live reviewer routing change, paid reviewer promotion, recurring paid routing policy, external service integration, installed global skill edit, dependency or lockfile change, or unrelated Phase 8 work.
